title: THE $1 CODER: This CODER COSTS $1 AND GIVES YOU $50 WORTH USAGE!
summary: Command Code is a coding agent harness optimized for open-source models like DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, Qwen, and MiniMax. It improves agent performance through better routing, caching, context handling, and tool-call repair. The platform claims DeepSeek V4 Pro outperforms Opus 4.7 on hard tool-heavy evaluation slices and offers affordable subscription plans starting at one dollar per month.
